name: loyalty-interchange-protocol
description: An open interoperability protocol for loyalty, starting with foodservice.

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:admin
scripts.quickstart: npm run build:admin && tsx packages/cli/src/cli.ts quickstart
scripts.serve: npm run build:admin && tsx packages/cli/src/cli.ts serve
scripts.spec:check: npm run generate && git diff --exit-code -- spec/schemas spec/openapi.yaml packages/sdk/src/generated/client.ts
scripts.verify: npm run generate && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:examples && npm run build && npm run test:packages
